name: the persisted options-view carries real tool-options data for at least one third-party-tool-mapped rule
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>/dev/null; ruby -ryaml -e 'r=YAML.unsafe_load_file("view.yaml")["rules"]; ok=r.values.any?{|o| o["options"].is_a?(Hash) && o["options"].values.any?{|v| v.is_a?(Hash) && !v.empty?} }; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)' && echo view-has-options-data 1>&2
